hero.label: Made for Brainbase Labs
hero.headline: I want to help Brainbase turn AI labor into real growth.
hero.subheadline: I am excited by Brainbase because you are not just adding AI features, you are building AI workers that can handle full enterprise workflows. That makes Founding Growth especially compelling to me because it requires both sharp customer discovery and hands on execution at a moment when the category is still being defined.

whyCompany.title: Brainbase is building AI workers, not simple AI tools
whyCompany.body: What stands out to me is Brainbase's focus on industry grade AI workers tailored to each business, not generic assistants. The combination of applied AI research, high fidelity agent environments, and a new agent language suggests a real product advantage in handling longer and more complex workflows.

whyCompany.title: Early team, category creation, and a true founding seat
whyCompany.body: With a five person team and YC backing, this feels like a rare moment where the growth function is still being created from scratch. Joining now means helping shape messaging, experiments, and the marketing culture while the market for enterprise AI labor is opening up fast.

whyCompany.title: I have already done outbound and B2B messaging work
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I did cold outreach, built LinkedIn sequences, worked in HubSpot, and helped acquire 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I deepened my digital marketing skills in a B2B consulting environment, which makes me excited to bring both outbound discipline and growth experimentation to Brainbase.

quote: I want this role because Brainbase is tackling a real shift in how work gets done, and I want to help translate that into demand. The chance to be close to the founder, the product, and the customer at this stage is exactly the kind of challenge I am looking for.
